purpose: Evaluate a predeclared risk-aware latent edit controller. The controller combines target response and curvature risk; all attributes and all baselines are reported regardless of outcome.

experiments.claim_tested: A predeclared gain/risk score can select safer edit directions than gain-only, random, and high-risk baselines at matched semantic change.
experiments.reporting_rule: Use the fixed candidate universe from control_direction_matched_full. Report all five FFHQ attributes and all five methods. Do not tune risk_power, min_gain_quantile, or k_select after seeing results.
